name: Peanut Butter Cookies (Am)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the peanut butter, honey, and vanilla extract together in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the barley flour and brown rice flour together.
3. Add the dry mixture to the wet ingredients and stir until combined.
4. Roll the dough into small balls.
5. Place the cookie balls on an oiled baking sheet.
6. Flatten each ball slightly with a fork or rolling pin.
7. Bake for 7-8 minutes at 350°F (175°C).
8. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet before removing them.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "COOKIES" tri-fold, Reprinted by permission of Arrowhead Mills, Inc.
